name: wavepet
description: WavePet tracks and predicts Codex desktop-pet waiting-experience states from live Codex events.

interface.shortDescription: Track live Codex progress and predict desktop-pet waiting states.
interface.longDescription: WavePet estimates user-perceived waiting experience from live assistant tokens, thinking, tool calls, edits, tests, and errors. It provides online state tracking, lightweight near-term pressure signals, and stable JSON presentation hints for rich desktop pets or single-image pets.
defaultPrompt: Use WavePet to design a pet-state adapter.
Map my Codex events into desktop-pet state JSON.
Create a simple pet renderer from state JSON.
